steps.title: Match a visible influence
steps.content: The example after the dash says tourists can easily recognize Spanish-mission inspiration in Union Station. The blank must describe the Spanish contribution to California architecture as clearly noticeable throughout the state.

steps.title: Reject wrong word meanings
steps.content: Choice A means confirmed by evidence, not visibly present. Choice B contradicts the easy recognition described in the passage. Choice C suggests dispute, but no disagreement is mentioned. The remaining word means obvious or readily perceived. The answer is D.
